title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates!
